description_long: This bungalow features a modern, symmetrical facade with a prominent covered porch supported by columns and a wide, tiled entryway. The structure is set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway leading to the front entrance, surrounded by a manicured lawn. The roof is a dark, multi-hipped design with moderate overhangs, providing both aesthetic appeal and functional weather protection. Large windows are arranged symmetrically on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored plaster and brick accents, with white railings and trim adding contrast. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall, enhancing privacy while maintaining an open, welcoming appearance.
description: A modern bungalow with a hip roof, wide covered porch, symmetrical windows, and a mix of plaster and brick exterior, set on a landscaped plot with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide porch with columns, tiled walkway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway, side lawn, and the full width of the porch and entry steps.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the solid wall with fewer windows and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Back and side view showing the hip roof's geometry, rear patio area, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
